---
title: "Hvernig gengur?"
subtitle: "Efnahagsleg þróun frá upphafi hverrar ríkisstjórnar"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(zoo)
library(timetk)
library(plotly)
```

```{r data}
# Helper
fix_date <- function(string, quarterly = FALSE) {
  if (quarterly) {
    temp_string <- str_replace(string, "Á", "Q")
    date(as.yearqtr(temp_string))
  } else {
    make_date(str_sub(string, 1, 4), str_sub(string, 6, 7))
  }
}

# Ríkisstjórnir
rikisstjornir_tbl <- tibble(
  date = as.Date(c(
    "2028-12-01",  # Framtíðardagsetning til að framlengja tímalínu
    "2024-12-21",
    "2024-04-09",
    "2021-11-28",
    "2017-11-30",
    "2017-01-11",
    "2016-04-07",
    "2013-05-23",
    "2009-02-01",
    "2007-05-24",
    "1995-04-23"
  )),
  government = c(
    "Samfylkingin, Viðreisn, Flokkur fólksins",
    "Samfylkingin, Viðreisn, Flokkur fólksins",
    "Sjálfstæðisflokkur, Framsókn, Vinstri græn",
    "Sjálfstæðisflokkur, Framsókn, Vinstri græn",
    "Sjálfstæðisflokkur, Framsókn, Vinstri græn",
    "Sjálfstæðisflokkur, Viðreisn, Björt framtíð",
    "Sjálfstæðisflokkur, Framsókn, Viðreisn, Björt framtíð",
    "Sjálfstæðisflokkur, Framsókn",
    "Samfylkingin, Vinstri græn",
    "Sjálfstæðisflokkur, Samfylkingin",
    "Sjálfstæðisflokkur, Framsókn"
  )
) |>
  mutate(date = floor_date(date, "month")) |>
  arrange(date) |>
  pad_by_time(.date_var = date, .by = "month") |>
  fill(government, .direction = "down") |>
  mutate(change_flag = government != lag(government, default = first(government))) |>
  mutate(period_group = cumsum(change_flag)) |>
  group_by(government, period_group) |>
  mutate(new_name = paste0(government, "\n(", min(date), " – ", max(date), ")")) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-c(change_flag, period_group))

# CPI
vnv_tbl <- read_csv2("https://px.hagstofa.is:443/pxis/sq/d37f3711-20e0-47ef-924b-8691f3cb6f11") |>
  set_names("date", "vnv", "vnvh") |>
  select(-vnvh) |>
  mutate(
    date = fix_date(date)
    # Verðlag = vnv / lag(vnv, 12) - 1
    ) |> 
  rename("Verðlag" = "vnv") |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -date)

# Unemployment & employment
vmsk_tbl <- read_csv2("https://px.hagstofa.is:443/pxis/sq/8b9531d3-8044-4da0-80c4-d3e25bda3de5") |>
  set_names("date", "mannfjoldi", "atvinnulausir", "starfandi") |>
  transmute(
    "Atvinnuleysi" = atvinnulausir / mannfjoldi,
    `Hlutfall starfandi` = starfandi / mannfjoldi,
    date = fix_date(date)
  ) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -date)

# Interest rates (local)
styrivextir_tbl <- read_csv2("data/meginvextir.csv") |>
  set_names("date", "Stýrivextir") |>
  mutate(
    date        = floor_date(dmy(date), "month"),
    Stýrivextir = Stýrivextir / 100
  ) |>
  group_by(date) |>
  summarise(Stýrivextir = max(Stýrivextir)) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -date)

# Combine → long format
data_m_tbl <-
  bind_rows(
    vnv_tbl,
    vmsk_tbl,
    styrivextir_tbl
  ) |> 
  left_join(rikisstjornir_tbl, by = "date") |>
  drop_na()
```

```{r plot}
# Compute delta from government start, cap at 60 months
plot_data <- data_m_tbl |>
  filter(!name == "Verðlag") |> 
  group_by(name, new_name) |>
  mutate(
    manudir = row_number(),
    delta   = value - value[1]
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  bind_rows(
    data_m_tbl |> 
      filter(name == "Verðlag") |> 

  group_by(new_name) |> 
  mutate(
    manudir = row_number(),
    delta = value / value[1] - 1
  )
  ) |> 
    filter(manudir <= 60)

# Stable color palette per government period
gov_levels <- plot_data |>
  distinct(new_name) |>
  arrange(new_name) |>
  pull(new_name)

palette <- c(
  "#4E79A7", "#F28E2B", "#E15759", "#76B7B2",
  "#59A14F", "#EDC948", "#B07AA1", "#FF9DA7",
  "#9C755F", "#BAB0AC"
)
color_map <- setNames(palette[seq_along(gov_levels)], gov_levels)

indicators <- unique(plot_data$name)

# Pre-compute data for each indicator × government
precomputed <- map(indicators, function(ind) {
  df_ind <- plot_data |> filter(name == ind)
  map(gov_levels, function(gov) {
    df_g <- df_ind |> filter(new_name == gov)
    if (nrow(df_g) == 0) {
      list(x = list(NA), y = list(NA), text = list(""))
    } else {
      y_fmt <- scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)(df_g$delta)
      hover_txt <- paste0(
        "<b>", str_wrap(gov, width = 40) |> str_replace_all("\n", "<br>"), "</b><br>",
        "Mánuður: ", df_g$manudir, "<br>",
        "Breyting: ", y_fmt
      )
      list(x = as.list(df_g$manudir), y = as.list(df_g$delta), text = as.list(hover_txt))
    }
  })
})
names(precomputed) <- indicators

# Build one trace per government (data swapped by buttons, legend state preserved)
fig <- plot_ly()

for (i in seq_along(gov_levels)) {
  gov  <- gov_levels[i]
  init <- precomputed[[indicators[1]]][[i]]
  fig <- fig |> add_trace(
    x           = init$x,
    y           = init$y,
    type        = "scatter",
    mode        = "lines",
    name        = gov,
    text        = init$text,
    hoverinfo   = "text",
    line        = list(color = color_map[gov], width = 2),
    legendgroup = gov
  )
}

# Y-axis titles per indicator
yaxis_titles <- c(
  "Verðlag"            = "Breyting á vísitölu (stig)",
  "Atvinnuleysi"       = "Breyting (prósentustig)",
  "Hlutfall starfandi" = "Breyting (prósentustig)",
  "Stýrivextir"        = "Breyting (prósentustig)"
)

# Build updatemenus buttons (swap data, not visibility)
buttons <- map(seq_along(indicators), function(idx) {
  ind <- indicators[idx]
  dat <- precomputed[[ind]]
  list(
    method = "update",
    args   = list(
      list(
        x    = map(dat, ~ .x$x),
        y    = map(dat, ~ .x$y),
        text = map(dat, ~ .x$text)
      ),
      list(
        yaxis = list(title = list(text = yaxis_titles[ind], font = list(size = 12)), tickformat = ".1%"),
        title = list(text = paste0("<b>", ind, "</b>"), font = list(size = 18))
      )
    ),
    label = ind
  )
})

fig <- fig |>
  layout(
    title = list(
      text = paste0("<b>", indicators[1], "</b>"),
      font = list(size = 18, color = "#333333"),
      x    = 0.5, xanchor = "center"
    ),
    xaxis = list(
      title      = list(text = "Mánuðir frá upphafi ríkisstjórnar", font = list(size = 12)),
      showgrid   = TRUE,
      gridcolor  = "#eeeeee",
      zeroline   = FALSE,
      tickfont   = list(size = 11)
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      title      = list(text = yaxis_titles[indicators[1]], font = list(size = 12)),
      showgrid   = TRUE,
      gridcolor  = "#eeeeee",
      zeroline   = TRUE,
      zerolinecolor = "#cccccc",
      zerolinewidth = 1.5,
      tickformat = ".1%",
      tickfont   = list(size = 11)
    ),
    legend = list(
      orientation = "v",
      x           = 1.01,
      y           = 1,
      font        = list(size = 10),
      bgcolor     = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)",
      bordercolor = "#dddddd",
      borderwidth = 1
    ),
    updatemenus = list(list(
      type       = "buttons",
      direction  = "right",
      x          = 0.0,
      xanchor    = "left",
      y          = 1.12,
      yanchor    = "top",
      buttons    = buttons,
      bgcolor    = "#f5f5f5",
      bordercolor = "#cccccc",
      font       = list(size = 12),
      pad        = list(r = 6, t = 4, b = 4, l = 6)
    )),
    plot_bgcolor  = "#ffffff",
    paper_bgcolor = "#ffffff",
    margin        = list(t = 100, r = 220, b = 60, l = 60),
    hovermode     = "closest"
  ) |>
  config(
    displayModeBar = FALSE,
    responsive     = TRUE
  )

fig$width  <- "100%"
fig$height <- 700
fig
```

::: {style="color: #888; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-top: 1.5rem;"}
**Heimild:** Hagstofa Íslands og Seðlabanki Íslands. Gögn eru mánaðarleg. Y-ásinn sýnir breytingu frá fyrsta mánuði hverrar ríkisstjórnar. Hámark 60 mánuðir.
:::
